offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate sales forecasts cause overstock and stockouts. We provide actionable insights instead of manual spreadsheets and basic analytics tools.
problem: Inaccurate sales forecasts leading to overstock and stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on sales forecasting
DM 20-50 Shopify store owners with demo video
Join community forums for Shopify store tools
try_it: Let users try Sales trend visualization and Basic forecasting model on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
